## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include any CLI commands, config keys, or UI changes you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues, mockups.
